svg.title: Teen Mental Health ML Pipeline — 6-step plan
svg.desc: Flowchart of the full DS workflow from data loading to model saving, with dataset facts and key tasks per step.

g.text: 1,200 rows · 13 columns · target: depression_label (binary) · class imbalance: 97% / 3%

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Lets start Step 1: Data Loading and Exploration')
g.text: Load CSV · shape/dtypes · null check · value counts
Describe stats · class balance · correlation matrix

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Lets start Step 2: EDA and Visualizations')
g.text: Distribution plots · box plots by label · platform vs depression
Heatmap · pairplot · social media hours vs stress/anxiety

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Lets start Step 3: Data Preprocessing and Feature Engineering')
g.text: Handle imbalance: SMOTE on training set only (minority class = 3%)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Lets start Step 4: Model Training — Multiple ML Models')
g.text: Logistic Regression · Random Forest · Gradient Boosting (XGBoost)
Metrics: accuracy, precision, recall, F1, ROC-AUC — comparison table
GridSearchCV on top 2 models · cross-validation (stratified k-fold)
Compare tuned vs baseline · select best model

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Lets start Step 6: SHAP Explainability and Model Saving')
g.text: SHAP summary plot · feature importance bar chart
Waterfall plot for individual prediction · SHAP beeswarm
Save best model as .pkl (joblib) — ready for Azure pipeline
